site_tagline: A paper island for learning to code, do maths, and think like a scientist.

home.hero_subtitle: Come and explore my island: two big trails are waiting for you.
home.path_math_desc: 17 visual techniques for multiplying numbers — from the finger trick to the colourful times-table.
home.path_python_desc: 42 illustrated chapters to learn Python with the Turtle: shapes, colours, mini-games, debugging.
home.path_gallery_desc: All the drawings Pina made following your commands. Tap on one to see how it was born.
home.path_exercises_desc: 50 challenges, 30 bugs to hunt, printable cards, and curious stories.
home.kid_safe: Kid-safe site: no sign-up, no ads, no tracking. Your progress stays on your device.

math.title: Number Friends
math.subtitle: Many roads to the same multiplication. Pick your favourite.
math.trucco9_card_desc: Open your hands and try: the secret of the 9 times table in ten animated steps.
math.manuale_card_desc: Eight parts, thirty-five chapters, all the times tables, real-life problems and critical thinking. The full illustrated course.

math_manuale.title: Multiplication manual
math_manuale.subtitle: Eight parts, thirty-five illustrated chapters to build solid multiplicative thinking.

math_appendice.title: Appendix — Exercise bank
math_appendice.subtitle: Worksheets, graded problems, olympic problems, progress tracking.

python.title: Code with Pina
python.subtitle: Ten parts, forty-two chapters. Take your time — turtles don't run.
python.translation_note: The long chapter prose is shown in its original Italian. Titles and summaries are translated.

gallery.title: Pina's Gallery
gallery.subtitle: All the drawings you can create with the manual. Click on one to view it full-size.

exercises.title: Exercises, challenges & cards
exercises.subtitle: Fifty challenges by ascending difficulty, thirty bugs to find, and printable material.

progress.title: My progress
progress.subtitle: Everything you've done on this island. Only you can see it — it's saved on your device.
progress.badge_first_chapter_desc: You read the first chapter of the manual.
progress.badge_part_complete_desc: You finished all the chapters in a Part.
progress.badge_python_complete_desc: You completed all 42 chapters of the manual.
progress.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all progress? This cannot be undone.
progress.empty_state: Open a chapter or a technique to start the adventure!

sync.title: Sync your progress
sync.intro: Get a secret code and find your progress on any device: web, phone, tablet.
sync.help_share: Write down the code or copy it. You'll need it to recognise yourself on other devices.
sync.enable_help: An anonymous code will be generated — no email, no password.
sync.enter_help: Type the code you have on the other device to retrieve your progress.

footer.made_with: Made with care for those who are growing up.
footer.open_source_note: All content is grounded in 50 years of international research on learning.
footer.credits_text: Constructionism (Papert, MIT), CPA (Singapore), PRIMM (NCCE UK), Hello Ruby (Linda Liukas), Mathigon, Khan Academy Kids, Hello Code (CS Unplugged, NZ).

common.error: Something went wrong. Try reloading the page.
